text.title: Puppeteer Session Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for puppeteer-session-management.

conclusion.verdict: userDataDir per identity (still reused across runs); per-task Bash worker
daemon + default context; agent enqueues tasks
save/load cookies as JSON; userDataDir not viable in stateless env

text.example: lifetime=long_lived → concurrent=true → daemon + incognito context per job + userDataDir per identity. Rule: incognito-for-parallel.
